title: Medical Symbols: Copy & Paste ⚕ Caduceus, Rx & Health Signs
meta_description: Copy and paste medical symbols — the staff of Aesculapius, caduceus, prescription Rx mark, medical crosses, and health and emergency signs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The medical staff, caduceus, Rx mark, and the crosses and health signs that go with them. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Medical symbols mark pharmacies, hospitals, and health information. This library gathers the staff of Aesculapius and caduceus, the prescription Rx character, the medical and Greek crosses, and the emergency and health emoji used in modern messaging — all as plain Unicode characters you can copy anywhere.

sections.label: Medical
sections.intro: The traditional medical staff symbols and the prescription mark.

sections.label: Crosses
sections.intro: Cross and plus marks used for clinics, first aid, and health services.

sections.label: Health
sections.intro: Modern health, treatment, and emergency emoji.

related.title: Cross & X Symbols
related.desc: Crosses, multiplication marks, and X characters to copy and paste.

related.title: Hazard & Warning Symbols
related.desc: Radioactive, biohazard, and warning signs in Unicode.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.
